entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange aggregation and transaction-broadcast infrastructure providing routed quotes, executable swaps, and low-latency on-chain execution across major blockchain ecosystems.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and API documentation expose active quote, swap, order, and transaction-broadcast products across multiple chains and DEX sources. Current independent metrics report substantial non-zero DEX aggregator volume. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: LiquidMesh official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies LiquidMesh as a multi-chain DEX aggregator and on-chain transaction-broadcast infrastructure provider and documents live quote and swap APIs.

evidence.title: LiquidMesh DEX aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent DEX aggregator rankings report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed swap volume for LiquidMesh.
